name: Cream-Cheese Fudge
recipeInstructions:
Servings: 1 pound
DIRECTIONS: Beat the cream cheese and heavy cream until smooth. Gradually beat in the confectioners' sugar. Add the melted chocolate and blend thoroughly. Stir in the vanilla, salt, and chopped nuts. Press into a buttered 8x4x2 inches pan and chill. Cut into squares.
Source: Mom's old magazine clippings - 1940's to 1970's
From: Sallie Austin
